nodes.name: 马耳他
nodes.summary: 马耳他是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括乳色走鸻、蓝山雀、水蒲苇莺等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 開普省
nodes.summary: 開普省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括南非鸭、White-backed mousebird、Neddicky等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 水蒲苇莺
nodes.summary: 水蒲苇莺（学名：Acrocephalus schoenobaenus）又称蒲苇莺，为鶲科苇莺属的鸟类，主要分布在欧洲到中亚之间的地区，冬季时则迁徙到撒哈拉以南非洲越冬。在中国大陆，分布于新疆等地。该物种的模式产地在瑞典。 参考文献
nodes.shortSummary: 水蒲苇莺（学名：Acrocephalus schoenobaenus）又称蒲苇莺，为鶲科苇莺属的鸟类，主要分布在欧洲到中亚之间的地区，冬季时则迁徙到撒哈拉以南非洲越冬。在中国大陆，分布于新疆等地。该物种的模式产地在瑞典。 参考文献

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Sedge warblers are migratory, crossing the Sahara to get from their European and Asian breeding grounds to spend winter in Africa

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Poyser | location = London, UK | year = 2002 | pages = 544–547 | isbn = 978-0-7136-6514-7}} All sedge warblers spend winter in sub-Saharan Africa, from Senegal in the west to Ethiopia in the east, and as far south as the eastern Cape Province of South Africa and northern Namibia

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Birds ringed in the United Kingdom and Netherlands are later found from south-west Iberia to Italy; birds from Sweden are recovered in central Europe and Italy; while Finnish birds are found in north-east Italy and Malta east to the Aegean region

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Though it is often found in wetlands, it can breed or more away from water. During the breeding season, this is a species found in reedbeds, often with scrub, ditches and habitats away from water including hedgerows, patches of stinging nettles, and arable crops.{{Cite book | last = Tucker | first = Graham M
